authority: Official manufacturer wording captured by the canonical dry-run catalogue
editorial_policy: A model is not assigned a Quivrr public family, Board DNA, performance ranking or relationship merely because its name resembles a known category. Unknown remains the public result until official family evidence exists.

manufacturers.summary: AU, EU and US Shopify storefronts were reconciled into one global staged catalogue. Official descriptions, images, product URLs, construction labels and standard sizes are available.
Only current-production models qualified by the official Shopify reconciliation are represented; historic, archive, placeholder and $0 products are not promoted as catalogue evidence.
Official model-page descriptions, product URLs, imagery, ACT and TEC construction labels and standard sizes are available in the staged catalogue.
Manufacturer-level awareness only: official model pages did not provide sufficient model-specific standard-size evidence, so no model review or catalogue is published.

relationships.reason: No source-backed model-to-model relationship evidence was captured for the staged manufacturers.
